arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush: Frankfurt chief issues major Man City transfer update as £67m forward scores in Bundesliga win
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt chief Markus Krosche delivers an update on the future of Man City-linked Omar Marmoush, who scored in the Bundesliga club's 1-0 win over St Pauli on Saturday.

Previously at West Ham, Mubama made 18 senior appearances, including five in the Premier League, and scored one goal for the Hammers. Divin Mubama has been named in the starting XI of our FA Cup clash with League Two outfit Salford City.

arts.ttl: Why Kyle Walker is missing from Man City squad vs Salford in FA Cup
arts.sum: Manchester City named an experimental side to take on Salford in the FA Cup, with captain Kyle Walker notable in his absence all together.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd legend and Salford co-owner Ryan Giggs is in dugout for Man City clash
arts.sum: Ryan Giggs will assist Karl Robinson as he looks to guide Salford to a famous win over Premier League giants Manchester City in the third round of the FA Cup on Saturday night

arts.ttl: Man City confirmed XI vs. Salford: Divin Mubama handed debut as Pep Guardiola makes nine changes for FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Divin Mubama will make his senior Man City debut in tonight's FA Cup third round clash with Salford, as Pep Guardiola makes nine changes.

arts.ttl: Player expected at Manchester City next week for medical – Club record deal being finalised
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov is expected at Manchester City at the start of next week to undergo a medical and complete his move from Lens. That’s according to journalist Fabrice Hawkins, who reports that the player has been left out of the Lens squad for the clash with Le Havre because of the impending move. arts.ttl: Manchester City’s first offer for player considered ‘low’ – Second bid incoming, club in no rush to sell
arts.sum: Manchester City’s offer for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis is considered ‘low’ at this moment in time because it’s not clear what is fixed and what will be bonuses. That’s according to journalist André Hernan who reports that the bid from Manchester City for the youngster is very much a ‘first offer’. arts.ttl: Manchester City v Salford City: FA Cup third round – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 5.45pm GMT kick-off at the Etihad Get in touch! Share your thoughts in an email to Rob Read Will Unwin’s preview Salford are third in League Two and optimism is building that they could exit it through the ceiling rather than the floor. Robinson is doing an impressive job with the players at his disposal and the academy is starting to produce players to give hints of an upward curve. The former Oxford manager backed the owners after meeting them just over a year ago to discuss the job. He had so much faith he did not sign a contract for the first seven matches of his reign and he could further repay their decision to hire him by attracting the finance to kickstart their ambitions. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Salford City - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Pep Guardiola leaves fans baffled with team selection for visit of League Two side
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Manchester City host League Two side Salford City at the Etihad in the third round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola gives next job update in subtle Gary Neville dig
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been involved in a number of high-profile rows with Salford co-owner Gary Neville during his time at Manchester City
